response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering background (~15+ years) with proven full-stack and systems work, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role: there is no recent C++ experience on Windows (only a brief 6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure. The skill set leans heavily toward TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS platforms rather than the Windows-based C++ capital markets stack required.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across diverse stacks
Low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/second
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
Note: limited to 3 — selected the most relevant
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ on Windows experience (only ~6 months at NI in 2014-2015)
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL background appears limited to MySQL/MongoDB

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
